description: Nightly digest of the user's social circles: items + Neo4j graph trends in (as a 'questions' payload), hot digest out. The LLM node is RocketRide's OpenAI-compatible connector pointed at the Butterbase AI gateway — so the pipeline calls Butterbase for inference (no separate model key).

components.name: Digest Writer (Butterbase gateway)
components.description: Synthesizes the hot digest via the Butterbase AI gateway (OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions)
